summary: Solid implementation. Workflow: good trigger choice, least-privilege permissions, pinned checkout action. Python: type hints, clear error handling, meaningful exit codes. Minor issues: `pip install --break-system-packages` (unconventional), actionlint download without checksum verification (security concern). Run_act_tests.py correctly implements integration harness pattern with defensive file handling. Conciseness: workflow test-case steps (lines 40-57) are repetitive but unavoidable in YAML; pytest assertions are verbose but explicit. Fixtures/tests missing from submission but correctly referenced. Strong modularity and extensibility.
